briefdescription.para: This function will set the channel IDs to correspond with the supplied channel ID based on the protocol.

detaileddescription.para: HDMI uses 3 channels; This ID translation is done to allow other functions to operate iteratively over multiple channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the channel ID used to determine the indices.
is a pointer to the start channel ID to set.
is a pointer to the end channel ID to set.

simplesect.para: The contents of Id0 and Id1 will be set according to ChId.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a pointer to the HDMI parameters based on the GT type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.

listitem.para: A pointer to the HDMI GT characteristics.
NULL if the GT type is unsupported.

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the System Clock Selection.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the MMCM programming values based on Max Rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

simplesect.para: Based on the MAX Rate set in the GUI, the MMCM values are selected. 3 -> Max Rate selected in GUI is 3G 6 -> Max Rate selected in GUI is 6G 8 -> Max Rate selected in GUI is 8G 10 -> Max Rate selected in GUI is 10G 12 -> Max Rate selected in GUI in 12G

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Video PHY for HDMI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is a pointer to the configuration structure that will be used to copy the settings from.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_SysClkDataSelType TxSysPllClkSel, XHdmiphy1_SysClkDataSelType RxSysPllClkSel)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_HdmiUpdateClockSelection

briefdescription.para: This function Updates the HDMIPHY clocking.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the SYSCLKDATA selection for TX.
is the SYSCLKDATA selection for RX.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the GT TX alignment module.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the channel ID to operate on.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either assert or deassert reset on the TX alignment module, respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the GT TX alignment module.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the channel ID to operate on.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either start or ttop the TX alignment module, respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the HDMIPHY's detector peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the clock detector respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the clock detector TX/RX timer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

briefdescription.para: This function resets clock detector TX/RX frequency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the clock detector frequency lock counter threshold value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the threshold value to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the clock detector accuracy range value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the threshold value to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function checks clock detector RX/TX frequency zero indicator bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

simplesect.para:
- TRUE if zero frequency.
FALSE otherwise, if non-zero frequency.

briefdescription.para: This function sets clock detector frequency lock counter threshold value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the timeout value and is normally the system clock frequency.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u32 TimeoutVal)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_ClkDetTimerLoad

briefdescription.para: This function loads the timer to TX/RX in the clock detector.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.
is the timeout value to store in the clock detector.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the frequency of the RX/TX reference clock as measured by the clock detector peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

simplesect.para: The measured frequency of the RX/TX reference clock.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the raw (unconditional) frequency of the RX/TX reference clock as measured by the clock detector peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike XHdmiphy1_ClkDetGetRefClkFreqHz, this function always returns the measured value regardless of lock status - useful for debugging.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

simplesect.para: The raw measured frequency of the RX/TX reference clock.
This function returns the actual measured frequency value even when lock conditions are not met. Use this for debugging to determine if a clock is present vs not locked.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the frequency of the DRU reference clock as measured by the clock detector peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

simplesect.para: The measured frequency of the DRU reference clock.
The design must have a DRU for this function to return a valid value.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the raw (unconditional) frequency of the DRU reference clock as measured by the clock detector peripheral.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike XHdmiphy1_DruGetRefClkFreqHz, this function always returns the measured value without any range checking - useful for debugging.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

simplesect.para: The raw measured frequency of the DRU reference clock.
This function returns the actual measured frequency value without range validation. Use this for debugging to see the raw DRU clock measurement independent of expected frequency ranges.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the DRU in the HDMIPHY.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the channel ID to operate on.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the DRU respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function enabled/disables the DRU in the HDMIPHY.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the channel ID to operate on.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the DRU, respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the DRU version.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the DRU center frequency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
specifies the channel ID.
is the frequency value to set.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the center frequency value for the DRU.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 GT core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.

simplesect.para: The calculated DRU Center frequency value.
According to XAPP1240: Center_f = fDIN * (2^32)/fdruclk The DRU clock is derived from the measured reference clock and the current QPLL settings.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the GT RX CDR and Equalization for DRU mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
enables the DRU logic (when 1), or disables (when 0).

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, XVidC_PixelsPerClock Ppc, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_HdmiCfgCalcMmcmParam

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the HDMI MMCM parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

specifies the total number of pixels per clock.
1 = XVIDC_PPC_1
2 = XVIDC_PPC_2
4 = XVIDC_PPC_4

specifies the color depth/bits per color component.
6 = XVIDC_BPC_6
8 = XVIDC_BPC_8
10 = XVIDC_BPC_10
12 = XVIDC_BPC_12
16 = XVIDC_BPC_16

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if calculated PLL parameters updated successfully.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_HdmiQpllParam

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the QPLL parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI GT core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if calculated QPLL parameters updated successfully.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_HdmiCpllParam

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the CPLL parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI GT core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if calculated CPLL parameters updated successfully.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XVidC_PixelsPerClock Ppc, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetHdmiTxParam

briefdescription.para: This function update/set the HDMI TX parameter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the pixels per clock to set.
is the bits per color to set.
is the color format to set.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if low resolution video not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function update/set the HDMI RX parameter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if low resolution video not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function enables or disables the Pattern Generator for the GT Channel 4 when it isused to generate the TX TMDS Clock.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
TRUE/FALSE

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Pattern Generator for the GT Channel 4 when it is used to generate the TX TMDS Clock.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
in Mbps.

briefdescription.para: This function will configure the HDMIPHY to HDMI 2.0 mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if low resolution video not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function will configure the FRL REF CLK for HDMI 2.1 operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u64 LineRate, u8 NChannels)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_Hdmi21Config

briefdescription.para: This function will configure the GT for HDMI 2.1 operation.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for RX or TX.
is the line rate for HDMI 2.1 operation.
is the number of channels for HDMI 2.1 operation.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if low resolution video not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function prints Video PHY debug information related to HDMI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.

briefdescription.para: This file contains video PHY functionality specific to the HDMI protocol.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
dd/mm/yy
1.0 gm 10/12/18 Initial release. 1.1 ku 24/07/20 Program MMCM params based on max line rate configured in IP GUI 1.2 ssh 02/02/23 Added API for Clock Detector Accuracy Range 1.3 ssh 17/07/23 Added support for MMCM/PLL Clock Primitive
